arts.ttl: Liverpool's five hottest prospects ready to burst onto the scene in League Cup quarter-final - including a fearless schemer and the striker turning up the heat on Darwin Nunez
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: Liverpool manager Arne Slot is set to ring the changes for his side's Carabao Cup quarter-final at managerless Southampton on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Rodrigo Bentancur seven-game ban appeal verdict: Can Tottenham midfielder play against Man United, Liverpool?
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur's appeal to reduce the seven-match ban imposed on midfielder Rodrigo Bentancur is dismissed by the Football Association.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'prepared to spend big' on one condition as FSG expert outlines £76.5m Man City vision
27 goals and 40 assists: Top journalist says Liverpool have Trent Alexander-Arnold replacement in mind
arts.sum: The future of Trent Alexander-Arnold at Liverpool remains uncertain as the right-back has yet to pen a new contract with the Merseyside club. The full-back’s current deal at Anfield expires in 2025 and there has been no major update on the 26-year-old’s situation. Behind the scenes, Liverpool are certainly working on new terms for Alexander-Arnold […] The post 27 goals and 40 assists: Top journalist says Liverpool have Trent Alexander-Arnold replacement in mind appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot admits he DOES try to 'influence' referees after receiving touchline ban - as Liverpool boss opens up on mistakes he has made with match officials
arts.sum: The Liverpool boss will serve a touchline ban for their trip to Southampton in the Carabao Cup on Wednesday after accumulating three yellow cards.

arts.ttl: Sky Sports Drop Update on Liverpool Move for ‘One of the Best’ Stars
arts.sum: Jeremie Frimpong is a man in hot demand across Europe but an update has emerged on his future, potentially ruling out a move to Liverpool

arts.ttl: Southampton Make ‘Elite’ Manager ‘One of the Favourites’ to Replace Martin
arts.sum: Southampton are in need of a new boss after sacking Russell Martin, and reports have stated that a Championship boss is a new name on their shortlist

arts.ttl: West Brom's Corberan under consideration for Southampton job
arts.sum: Southampton are considering West Brom head coach Carlos Corberan as a candidate to be their new manager, along with the former Denmark boss Kasper Hjulmand, and at least one other foreign manager.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah's agent has already confirmed he'll earn more than £1m per week if he signs new Liverpool deal
'Incredible' manager told to make one Southampton demand, he's 'inspired by Barcelona' football
